items.title: ChatGPT connector sign-in fails on first connect
items.body:
After adding a Tiddly MCP connector in ChatGPT, clicking "Sign in" opens a browser window that immediately bounces back with "There was a problem connecting. Try again later." — no sign-in page appears.

This is an [acknowledged OpenAI bug](https://community.openai.com/t/missing-openid-scope-in-dynamically-registered-oauth-clients/1368690) (open since December 2025): ChatGPT registers itself without a permission its own sign-in flow then requires, which affects any service using strict OAuth validation — not just Tiddly. There is no user-side workaround; ChatGPT connections will start working once OpenAI ships their fix.

Claude, Claude Code, and Codex are unaffected — see [AI Integration](/docs/ai) for their setup steps.

items.title: Text-only content — no image or file attachments
items.body: Bookmarks, notes, and prompts currently support text content only. You cannot upload or attach images, PDFs, or other files. Markdown image syntax (e.g., `![alt](url)`) works for referencing externally hosted images, but there is no built-in file hosting.

items.title: Extra line break when continuing loose lists
items.body:
When a markdown list has blank lines between items (a "loose" or "non-tight" list), pressing Enter to add a new item will insert an extra blank line to match the existing style. This is the default behavior of the CodeMirror markdown editor — it preserves the spacing pattern of the list.

For example, if you have:

```
- [ ] First item
                         ← blank line
- [ ] Second item
```

Pressing Enter after "First item" will add a new checkbox with a blank line above it, matching the loose list style. To avoid this, keep list items on consecutive lines without blank lines between them.

items.title: Shift+Arrow selection gets stuck on wrapped lines
items.body:
When word wrap is enabled and a line wraps to multiple visual lines, using Shift+Down or Shift+Up to extend the selection can get stuck at the visual line boundary. Regular arrow keys (without Shift) are not affected.

**Workaround:** Press Shift+Right to advance past the stuck point, then continue with Shift+Down. Alternatively, toggle word wrap off (Alt+Z) to avoid the issue.

items.title: Toolbar flickers when interacting with Find & Replace checkboxes
items.body: Clicking the checkboxes (e.g., "match case", "regexp") in the editor's Find & Replace panel can cause the formatting toolbar to briefly appear and disappear.
